sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Microsoft, NTT, Others to Form Tech Alliance
feed.summary: Microsoft Corp. and NTT Inc., alongside 14 other leading technology companies from 11 countries, are set to form the "Trusted Tech Alliance." Announced at the Munich Security Conference, this alliance aims to enhance the credibility of cross-border technologies. The initiative seeks to address concerns about digital sovereignty impacting healthy competition and will focus on operational transparency, robust supply chains, security, and data protection.

feed.title: Xcel Energy increases safety settings for heightened wind, wildfire risk
feed.summary: Xcel Energy is implementing enhanced power line safety settings in response to fire weather watches issued for parts of Colorado, including the Denver metro area, due to high winds and dry conditions. While not a public safety power shutoff, these changes will make power lines more sensitive to disturbances, potentially leading to unplanned outages and longer restoration times as crews will need to visually inspect lines before re-energizing. Xcel Energy urges customers to prepare for possible power loss and report outages through their online accounts.

feed.title: Allstate Corp Issues Potential Dividend Run Alert
feed.summary: Allstate Corp is poised for a potential "dividend run" as it approaches its ex-dividend date of March 2, 2026, with a dividend of $1.08. Historical data shows that in three out of the last four dividends, the stock gained more than the dividend amount *before* the ex-dividend date, suggesting an opportunity for capital gains. With a quarterly dividend frequency and a 2.08% implied annualized yield, Allstate presents an attractive option for dividend-focused investors, who employ various strategies like buying two weeks prior or selling the day before the ex-dividend date.

feed.title: Short Interest in F5, Inc. (NASDAQ:FFIV) Drops By 23.9%
feed.summary: Short interest in F5, Inc. (NASDAQ:FFIV) decreased by 23.9% in January, falling to 2,312,144 shares. This reduction, coupled with a days-to-cover ratio of 1.6, suggests reduced short-selling pressure. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings and optimistic FY26 guidance, yet faces ongoing risks including a "Hold" consensus analyst rating, securities class-action allegations, and clustered insider selling.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land (TPL) Is Up 18.1% After Pivoting Into AI-Linked West Texas Data Centers
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land (TPL) has seen an 18.1% stock increase after announcing a significant pivot into AI-linked West Texas data centers, investing $50 million and granting water rights to build campuses. This move, in partnership with Bolt Data & Energy, diversifies TPL's business beyond oil and gas royalties. While major holder Horizon Kinetics shows confidence, investors will closely watch the execution and revenue generation from this new AI infrastructure push.

feed.title: Xcel Energy prepares for potential power shutoffs amid wildfire risk in Texas, New Mexico
feed.summary: Xcel Energy is preparing for potential Public Safety Power Shutoffs (PSPS) in the northern Texas Panhandle and eastern New Mexico due to a forecast of critical fire weather, including extreme winds, low humidity, and dry vegetation. The company stated that temporary power disconnections might be necessary on Tuesday, February 17, to ensure public safety and prevent wildfires. This measure is a proactive step to mitigate risks associated with strong winds damaging power lines and causing unplanned outages.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Israel fined 17.7 million shekels by Competition Authority
feed.summary: The Israel Competition Authority has fined The Central Bottling Company, which operates Coca-Cola Israel and Tara Dairy, 17.7 million shekels for multiple violations of the Food Law. These violations include interfering with product display and pricing at retailers, and making prohibited payments. Despite the significant fine, which was substantially reduced from a potential maximum, no enforcement measures will be taken against senior company executives.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Oceaneering International (OII) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Run?
feed.summary: Oceaneering International (OII) has seen a strong multi-year run, prompting questions about its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is approximately 11.4% undervalued, while its current P/E ratio of 14.24x is below the industry average, indicating it's "about right" based on earnings. The article encourages investors to use "Narratives" on Simply Wall St to align their views with financial forecasts for a more personalized valuation.

feed.title: Ares Capital (ARCC) stock closes at $19.37 before Presidents Day break — what investors watch next
feed.summary: Ares Capital (ARCC) stock closed at $19.37 on Friday, February 14, 2026, ahead of the Presidents Day break, leaving investors to focus on upcoming Fed minutes, and new U.S. inflation and growth numbers. The business development company's stock, which holds floating-rate loans, is sensitive to Federal Reserve rate decisions that can impact dividend projections. ARCC recently announced a $0.48 first-quarter dividend per share and extended its $1 billion share buyback plan through 2027.

feed.title: Vital Farms (VITL) outpaces stock market gains: What you should know
feed.summary: This article from MSN reports that Vital Farms (VITL) stock has outperformed the broader market. It suggests investors should look into the reasons behind this strong performance.

feed.title: (LOMA) Price Dynamics and Execution-Aware Positioning
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily discusses the price dynamics and execution-aware positioning for Loma Negra Compania Industrial Argentina Sociedad Anonima (NASDAQ: LOMA). It highlights divergent sentiment readings, a mid-channel oscillation pattern, and an exceptional risk-reward setup targeting an 18.6% gain. The piece also outlines three AI-generated trading strategies (Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging) with specific entry, target, and stop-loss levels, alongside a multi-timeframe signal analysis.

feed.title: Is Kroger (KR) Pricing Look Justified After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
feed.summary: This article analyzes Kroger's (KR) stock valuation using two methods: Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio. The DCF model suggests Kroger is undervalued by 15.8% at US$71.25, with an intrinsic value of US$84.65 per share. However, its current P/E ratio of 57.73x is significantly higher than the industry average and Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 39.34x, indicating it is overvalued by this metric.

feed.title: Avoiding Lag: Real-Time Signals in (LPG) Movement
feed.summary: This article provides real-time signal analysis for Dorian Lpg Ltd. (NYSE: LPG), indicating strong sentiment and a breakout for higher levels, though with elevated downside risk. It outlines three AI-generated trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—tailored for different risk profiles, alongside multi-timeframe signal analysis. The piece emphasizes the importance of institutional-grade analysis for optimizing position sizing and managing risk.

feed.title: PG&E Partners with SPAN to Enhance Electrification Solutions
feed.summary: PG&E Corporation has announced a strategic partnership with SPAN to deploy the SPAN Edge solution, aiming to reduce the complexity and cost of residential electrification. This collaboration addresses a significant market opportunity within PG&E's service area, where over 600,000 homes may require electrification upgrades in the next decade. The initiative, including the PanelBoost program, focuses on cost efficiency and grid modernization to meet California's increasing demand for clean energy and reliable infrastructure.

feed.title: Bancolombia stock tests investors’ nerve as momentum cools after a strong run
feed.summary: Bancolombia's U.S.-listed shares are experiencing a cooling period after a strong rally, leading investors to question whether it's a consolidation phase or the start of a bearish trend. Despite a recent modest pullback, the stock still holds significant 12-month gains, driven by improving sentiment in Colombian financials and broader Latin American equities. The article discusses recent quarterly results, which, while solid, presented a more cautious outlook, leading to the current dip.

feed.title: Carrier Global Corp.: How a 100-Year-Old Climate Giant Is Quietly Rebuilding the Smart Building Stac
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corp. is transforming itself from a traditional HVAC manufacturer into a leader in smart, low-carbon building technology. By integrating high-efficiency hardware with advanced software and services, Carrier aims to provide comprehensive solutions for climate, energy, and safety in buildings, positioning itself as a climate infrastructure platform vendor. This strategic shift is driven by increasing demands for decarbonization, energy efficiency, and ESG compliance, and places Carrier in direct competition with other industry giants also vying for dominance in the smart building sector.

feed.title: Is Amazon.com (AMZN) Mason Morfit’s Top Pick?
feed.summary: Amazon.com (AMZN) is Mason Morfit’s largest holding, yet recent concerns regarding its cloud growth, high capital expenditures, and competition have pushed investors to re-evaluate. An analyst downgraded Amazon's stock and price target, citing its lack of a frontier AI lab and slower AWS growth. Despite these challenges, Amazon plans to launch a content marketplace for AI companies, countering competitive pressures.

feed.title: Is Apple (AAPL) John Overdeck's Top Pick?
feed.summary: Apple Inc. (AAPL) is the third largest holding in John Overdeck's portfolio, representing a 2.79% share valued at $1.39 billion. While still a significant investment, it trails NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) which remains his largest position. Recent developments for Apple include plans to allow third-party AI apps in CarPlay, moving beyond Siri-only, and upcoming product releases like the iPhone 17e and an iOS 26.4 beta.

feed.title: Is PG&E Corporation (PCG) Michael Platt's Top Pick?
feed.summary: PG&E Corporation (PCG) is Michael Platt's second-largest holding, comprising 3.41% of his portfolio. The company recently partnered with SPAN to deploy SPAN Edge, a solution that simplifies residential electrification by allowing customers to add EV chargers and heat pumps without major panel upgrades. This initiative aims to address the significant number of homes needing upgrades in PG&E's service area and promote capital-efficient grid modernization and customer affordability in California.

feed.title: Is CVS Health Corporation (CVS) Larry Robbins' top pick?
feed.summary: CVS Health Corporation (NYSE: CVS) is highlighted as Larry Robbins' top stock pick, accounting for a significant portion of his portfolio. Despite a decrease in fourth-quarter profit, CVS exceeded Wall Street expectations, showcasing early success in restructuring efforts. The company reaffirmed its revenue guidance for 2026, indicating a focus on execution discipline.

feed.title: Is Amazon.com (AMZN) Mason Morfit's Top Pick?
feed.summary: Amazon.com (AMZN) constitutes 12.96% ($768.60 million) of Mason Morfit's portfolio, making it his largest holding. Amazon is reportedly launching a content marketplace for AI companies, coinciding with Microsoft's similar initiative. Despite this, Amazon's stock dropped following Q4 earnings due to slowing cloud growth and high capital expenditures, leading one analyst to downgrade the stock and lower its price target.

feed.title: Is Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) Chase Coleman III’s Top Pick?
feed.summary: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is identified as Chase Coleman III's top stock pick, representing 10.49% of his portfolio. Citi views the recent software selloff as a fundamental opportunity for MSFT due to AI disruption concerns, noting its strong positioning in AI scenarios. However, Melius Research downgraded MSFT to 'Hold,' citing increased AI-driven capital expenditures and valuation concerns related to free cash flow.

feed.title: KKR Stock Tests Investor Nerves As Private Markets Optimism Meets Rate Jitters
feed.summary: KKR & Co. stock is at a crossroads, acting as a barometer for investor confidence in private markets amidst interest rate volatility. Despite recent gains and strong one-year performance, the stock experienced a choppy five-day stretch as traders reassessed rate expectations. Wall Street analysts are largely constructive on KKR, with several firms raising price targets and emphasizing the company's strong fee-related earnings and expansion into private credit and insurance.

feed.title: Short Interest in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF) Expands By 34.1%
feed.summary: Short interest in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF) significantly increased by 34.1% in January, reaching 9,996,888 shares. Despite mixed Q4 results where revenue beat estimates but EPS missed, several analysts raised their price targets and ratings, leading to a "Moderate Buy" consensus. The company's stock has also seen considerable institutional investment, with various firms either acquiring new stakes or increasing their positions.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE:WST) Sees Significant Increase in Short Interest
feed.summary: Short interest in West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE:WST) increased significantly by 33.4% as of January 30th, reaching 2,560,146 shares, representing about 3.6% of its shares sold short. This rise in bearish positioning occurred despite the company reporting a strong Q4 earnings beat and issuing bullish FY 2026 guidance, driven by robust demand for its High-Value Product (HVP) components and progress with its SmartDose system. Analysts currently hold a consensus "Buy" rating for WST with an average price target of $314.56.

feed.title: DOE-Backed Century Aluminum Project Signals Industrial Resurgence
feed.summary: The Department of Energy has awarded $500 million to Century Aluminum for the first new primary aluminum smelter in the U.S. since 1980, located in Inola, Oklahoma. This project, which includes a joint venture with Emirates Global Aluminum, aims to reverse the decline in domestic aluminum production and strengthen critical material supply chains for defense, aerospace, and infrastructure. It signals a renewed federal commitment to reshoring heavy industry and critical materials processing in the U.S.

feed.title: F5, INC. URGENT CLASS ACTION ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Urgently Reminds F5, Inc. Stockholders with Larges Losses to Contact the Firm Before February 17th
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that F5 made misleading statements regarding its security capabilities while experiencing a significant security breach, which was later revealed to have negatively impacted its fiscal 2026 growth expectations and stock price. Investors are urged to contact the firm before February 17, 2026, to apply for lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Loveland to eye business-assistance pact for new Costco
feed.summary: The Loveland City Council is set to consider a business-assistance agreement for a new Costco store at its upcoming meeting. The big-box retailer is proposed for the Centerra development in east Loveland. This development indicates a potential new major retail presence in the area, contingent on the council's approval.

feed.title: ChartWatch ASX Scans: Cochlear, CSL, Pro Medicus, Telix Pharmaceuticals, Technology One, Rio Tinto
feed.summary: This article provides a daily ChartWatch scan of the ASX, highlighting both uptrending and downtrending stocks based on technical analysis. It features specific companies like Rio Tinto in uptrends and Cochlear, CSL, Pro Medicus, Telix Pharmaceuticals, and Technology One in downtrends, offering lists and featured charts for investors to use in their trading strategies.

feed.title: John Schiro: $225K Complaint Against Raymond James Advisor
feed.summary: John Schiro, a financial advisor with Raymond James & Associates, is facing an investor complaint alleging $225,000 in damages due to unsuitable options investments made while he was with Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services. He was permitted to resign from his previous firm under internal review related to an investor complaint. The article highlights FINRA's suitability rule and Schiro's 15 years of industry experience.

feed.title: Tractor Supply looks to take on final-mile deliveries
feed.summary: This article states that Tractor Supply is looking to expand into final-mile deliveries. No further details are available in the provided content.

feed.title: Hungry to Grow Your Portfolio? These Food & Beverage ETFs May Help
feed.summary: This article compares two food and beverage ETFs, the Invesco Food & Beverage ETF (PBJ) and the First Trust Nasdaq Food & Beverage ETF (FTXG), for investors looking to diversify their portfolios. While FTXG offers a higher dividend yield, PBJ has significantly better long-term performance according to five-year returns. Investors should consider expense ratios, dividend payouts, top holdings, and overall risk tolerance when choosing between these two consumer defensive funds.

feed.title: Alpha Announces 2026 Domestic Sales Commitments
feed.summary: Alpha Metallurgical Resources has committed to supplying approximately 3.6 million tons of metallurgical coal to domestic customers for the 2026 calendar year at an average price of $136.75 per ton. CEO Andy Eidson indicated satisfaction with the current commitments and openness to contracting additional tonnage if needed. The company, based in Tennessee, supplies metallurgical products globally to the steel industry and emphasizes its financial resilience and conservative capital allocation strategy.

feed.title: (BEP.UN) Daily Stock Insights (BEP.UN:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides daily stock insights for Brookfield Renewable Partners L.P. (BEP.UN:CA), including trading plans with buy and short targets and stop losses, and strong ratings across near, mid, and long terms. It also lists AI-generated signals and a comprehensive list of recent articles related to BEP.UN.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Rollins Q4 2025 misses forecasts, stock drops By Investing.com
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. reported Q4 2025 earnings per share of $0.25 and revenue of $913 million, both falling short of analyst expectations, leading to a 16.87% drop in premarket stock trading. Despite the quarterly miss, the company achieved full-year revenue growth of 11% to $3.8 billion, driven by strong organic growth in recurring and ancillary services, and anticipates 7-8% organic growth in 2026. The Q4 underperformance was primarily attributed to adverse weather conditions impacting one-time service revenue, especially in the Midwest and Northeast.

feed.title: Constellation Energy Corporation stock (CEG) jumps 4.5% — what investors watch next
feed.summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) stock gained 4.46% to $288.43 on Friday, contributing to a 10% rebound from early February lows. Investors are closely watching a PJM grid plan and potential new data-center power deals, especially after Constellation's Calpine unit secured a 380-megawatt supply agreement with CyrusOne. A recent SEC filing also revealed Capital International Investors adjusted its 5.5% stake in the company.

feed.title: How GM, Ford, Stellantis stock performed this week
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) stock experienced a decline of 3.75% for the week ending February 13, closing at $81.08. In contrast, Ford Motor Co. and Stellantis saw their stock prices rise during the same period. This report details the stock performance for these major automotive companies.

feed.title: SPS Commerce, Inc. Just Beat Analyst Forecasts, And Analysts Have Been Updating Their Predictions
feed.summary: SPS Commerce (NASDAQ:SPSC) shares plunged 22% last week despite the company beating analyst profit forecasts with a statutory profit of US$2.46 per share, exceeding expectations. While revenues of US$752m were in line with predictions, analysts have since slightly downgraded their earnings per share forecasts for 2026 to US$2.55 and cut their price target by 16% to US$83.91, reflecting a lowered sentiment and slower projected revenue growth compared to the overall industry.

feed.title: BILL Holdings Weighs Sale As Activists Push For Profitability Shift
feed.summary: BILL Holdings (NYSE:BILL) is reportedly exploring a sale, with private equity firm Hellman & Friedman in talks for an acquisition. This move comes as activist investors are pushing for improved profitability and changes, following significant stock declines over the past few years. The company's board is reviewing alternatives amid current losses, despite revenue growth, and aims to find a path to consistent profitability.

feed.title: Earnings Release: Here's Why Analysts Cut Their West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE:WST) Price Target To US$319
feed.summary: Analysts have cut the price target for West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE:WST) to US$319 despite the company's annual results being roughly in line with revenue and EPS estimates. While revenue growth is expected to accelerate slightly faster than historical rates, matching the wider industry, the consensus price target dropped by 6.3%. This suggests analysts were not entirely reassured by the latest results, leading to a lower future valuation estimate.

feed.title: Brenmiller Energy Ltd. Announces Expected Implementation of 7-for-1 Reverse Share Split
feed.summary: Brenmiller Energy Ltd. announced a 7-for-1 reverse share split, expected to be implemented after market close on January 23, 2026. The company's shares will begin trading on Nasdaq on a post-split basis on January 26, 2026, under the existing symbol "BNRG". This action, approved by shareholders, will reduce the outstanding ordinary shares from 5,010,962 to 715,852, with fractional shares rounded to the nearest whole share.

feed.title: Amplify Energy’s Stock Tests Investor Nerves As Volatility Returns To A Small-Cap Oil Name
feed.summary: Amplify Energy's stock has experienced significant volatility, reflecting fragile investor sentiment around this small-cap oil and gas company. Despite a decline over the past year, its price swings attract risk-tolerant traders, with its performance closely tied to commodity prices and operational risks. Wall Street coverage remains thin and cautious, suggesting it's a niche play, suitable for investors willing to undertake their own detailed analysis due to limited institutional sponsorship.

feed.title: How Vulcan’s Ninth Straight Dividend Hike Will Impact Vulcan Materials (VMC) Investors
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials has increased its quarterly cash dividend by 6% to US$0.52 per share, marking its ninth consecutive annual hike, which signals management's confidence in cash generation and commitment to shareholder returns. This move reinforces the company's investment narrative focused on long-term demand for aggregates driven by infrastructure and growth in Sunbelt markets. While encouraging, investors should also consider the potential risks from a pullback in public funding or construction demand, despite the positive outlook reflected in the company's 2025 adjusted EBITDA guidance.

feed.title: Progressive Corp Reinvents Insurance as a Product, Not a Policy
feed.summary: Progressive Corp is transforming the insurance landscape by treating auto and home insurance as a real-time, data-driven product, leveraging telematics, APIs, and AI for pricing. Unlike traditional static policies, Progressive's offerings are continuously evolving technology stacks designed for personalization and responsiveness, akin to software services. This product-centric approach, emphasizing data moats, digital-first experiences, and pricing flexibility, has led to strong stock performance, positioning Progressive as a bellwether for the insurance sector's future.

feed.title: Mercury Systems Inc (NASDAQ:MRCY) Sees Large Decline in Short Interest
feed.summary: Short interest in Mercury Systems (NASDAQ:MRCY) significantly declined by 25.2% to 3.83 million shares as of January 30th, resulting in a 5.8 days-to-cover ratio. This reduction occurred despite a substantial sale of 400,000 shares by Director Jana Partners for $32.4 million and the company beating quarterly revenue and EPS estimates. Analysts remain divided on the stock, with a "Hold" consensus rating and a target price ranging from $55 to $109.

feed.title: American Homes 4 Rent Announces Fifth Consecutive Dividend Hike
feed.summary: American Homes 4 Rent has declared a 10% increase in its quarterly common stock dividend, raising it to $0.33 per share for the first quarter of 2026. This marks the fifth consecutive dividend hike for the single-family rental specialist, demonstrating a commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Investors are now anticipating the company's full-year 2025 financial results, to be released on February 19, to understand the operational performance supporting these dividend increases.

feed.title: Prediction: DigitalOcean Stock Is Going to Soar After Feb. 24
feed.summary: DigitalOcean stock is predicted to rally following its Q4 2025 earnings report on Feb. 24, driven by its significant growth in AI revenue, which has doubled year-over-year for the past five quarters. The company specializes in providing cloud and AI services to small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs), offering affordable and accessible solutions. Despite recent gains, DigitalOcean's stock is considered attractively valued compared to the broader tech market, positioning it for potential further growth.

feed.title: Valley National’s Digital Leadership Shake-Up Might Change The Case For Investing In Valley National Bancorp (VLY)
feed.summary: Valley National Bancorp recently appointed new leaders to oversee partner banking, digital channels, and customer care, signaling a strategic focus on fintech partnerships and digital transformation. This move aims to enhance its operating model and customer engagement, potentially reshaping its investment narrative. While the digital push supports growth, investors should consider the bank's continued exposure to concentrated regional markets and commercial real estate.

feed.title: Intel Faces India Fine While Advancing AI And GPU Ambitions
feed.summary: Intel is facing regulatory scrutiny in India due to an antitrust fine regarding its warranty policy, even as it aggressively expands its presence in AI and GPU technologies. The company plans significant investments in AI firm SambaNova Systems and has hired a high-profile GPU architect, signaling a strategic shift. Investors are advised to monitor Intel's ability to balance compliance with its ambitious AI and GPU development plans, especially given its current valuation and recent shareholder dilution.

feed.title: Gen Z Leads Biggest Drop in FICO Scores Since Financial Crisis
feed.summary: The article discusses a significant drop in FICO scores, particularly among Gen Z, marking the largest decline since the financial crisis. This trend indicates increasing financial stress and potentially higher credit risks for younger generations.
